Our Deal

Not a lot of
backstory, bro.

"Yeah, it's spelled wrong. That's the bit."

We ride. We wear things. We thought it'd be funny to sell some stuff with a beat-up sheep on it. So here we are.

$heeps on the $heaps is print-on-demand apparel with a biker soul and a sense of humor. Nothing too serious. Priced to fit into Harley-Davidson's secondary premium heritage brand luxury fashion category. Just decent gear for people who don't take themselves seriously.

The logo's got patches, bees, lightning bolts, and a sheep that's clearly been through some things. That's us. That's the vibe.

Shop Now
